risks.description: Ready state is mistaken for completed work.
risks.detection_signal: state moves from ready_to_execute to approved without evidence.
risks.prevention: require launch and evidence gates before promotion.
risks.evidence_requirement: state transition evidence and review note.
risks.escalation_rule: escalate to coordinator when evidence is missing.

risks.description: Two workers reserve the same bounded scope.
risks.detection_signal: duplicate active reservation for one scope.
risks.recovery_action: pause one reservation and merge proposals by coordinator decision.
risks.escalation_rule: escalate if scope ownership is unclear.

limitations: Synthetic matrix validates shape, not real operational coverage.
